questions.question: State Charles Darwin's contribution to the principles of experimentation in design. (5 marks)
questions.hint: In his book 'On the Origin of Species', Darwin proposed the concept of natural selection, which is a fundamental principle in experimental design.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a controlled experiment and a quasi-experiment? (5 marks)
questions.hint: In a controlled experiment, the researcher has full control over the variables, while in a quasi-experiment, the researcher only has partial control over the variables.

questions.question: Explain the concept of blocking in experimental design. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Blocking is a technique used in experimental design to reduce the impact of extraneous variables by dividing the experimental units into groups that are similar in all respects except the one being tested.
